calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carlena Tapella appeared by telephone for Lisa Berg (Trustee).

The Court granted the petition and informed Ms. Tapella that in the future, the Trustee should not make any payments to herself without Court approval. In addition, the Court stated that the matter would be transferred to Sacramento county.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.
